names.saju_meaning: Earth element substantial with Metal wisdom, solid yang energy of commanding intellect

names.meaning_long: 예(藝) artistic talent and creative mastery; 슬(瑟) the ancient zither, symbol of musical harmony and soulful sound. A girl whose every action has the rhythm and artistry of a perfectly played melody.
names.famous_examples: Actress Han Ye-seul, popular in Korean entertainment
names.saju_meaning: Metal element musical with Wood creativity, harmonious yin energy of artistic expression

names.meaning_long: 대(大) great, vast, and supreme; 현(賢) sagely wisdom and virtuous intellect. A boy destined to become a great sage, admired for both the scale of his wisdom and the virtue of his character.
names.famous_examples: B.A.P Daehyun (Jung Dae-hyun, powerful vocalist)
names.saju_meaning: Earth element vast with Water wisdom, deep yang energy of sagely leadership

names.meaning_long: 수정(水晶) water crystal, the purest and most transparent of all natural gems. A girl of absolute clarity and purity whose mind is like crystal — clear, brilliant, and refracting light into beauty.
names.famous_examples: Common in Korean beauty and modeling industries
names.saju_meaning: Water element crystallized with Metal purity, clear yin energy of absolute transparency

names.meaning_long: 영(英) heroic excellence and outstanding brilliance; 민(敏) quick-witted agility and sharp perception. A boy of heroic caliber whose mind works at lightning speed and whose excellence shines naturally.
names.famous_examples: B1A4 Baro's real name variant, common in Korean business leaders
names.kpop_match: Super Junior Leeteuk (similar sharp leadership energy)
names.saju_meaning: Metal element sharp with Fire brilliance, quick yang energy of heroic intelligence

names.meaning_long: 설(雪) pure white snow falling softly; 아(兒) a beloved child. A girl as pure and beautiful as freshly fallen snow, bringing a quiet magical wonder wherever she goes.
names.famous_examples: Common in Korean winter-born generations, K-drama names
names.saju_meaning: Water element pure with Metal frost, pristine yin energy of winter clarity and rare beauty

names.meaning_long: 민(旻) the clear autumn sky, vast and boundless; 석(碩) great and substantial achievement. A boy whose ambitions are as wide as the sky and whose accomplishments are as solid as stone.
names.famous_examples: EXO Xiumin (Kim Min-seok, oldest EXO member)
names.saju_meaning: Metal element great with Water sky, balanced yang energy of quiet substantial power

names.meaning_long: 지(智) penetrating wisdom and discernment; 은(恩) deep grace and loving kindness. A girl whose wisdom is expressed through acts of gracious kindness, combining intellect with a giving heart.
names.famous_examples: IU's real name (Lee Ji-eun), one of Korea's most beloved artists
names.saju_meaning: Water element wise with Earth grace, deep yin energy of intelligent compassion

names.meaning_long: 인(仁) the Confucian virtue of benevolence and human-heartedness; 성(星) a shining star in the heavens. A boy whose compassionate nature makes him shine like a star, guiding others with warmth.
names.famous_examples: SF9 Inseong (Kim In-seong, vocalist)
names.saju_meaning: Fire element stellar with Earth benevolence, warm yang energy of compassionate leadership

names.meaning_long: 하(夏) the abundant warmth of summer; 윤(允) genuine sincerity and gracious approval. A girl born with summer's abundance whose sincere heart earns the trust and affection of all.
names.famous_examples: One of the top baby names in South Korea 2020-2024
names.kpop_match: TWICE Sana (similar sunny warm personality energy)
names.saju_meaning: Fire element warm with Earth sincerity, bright yin energy of summer abundance and trust

names.meaning_long: 연(姸) beautiful and elegant in appearance and manner; 준(俊) outstanding talent and noble character. A boy of striking beauty paired with exceptional talent — grace and genius in equal measure.
names.famous_examples: TXT Yeonjun (Choi Yeon-jun, multi-talented K-pop idol)
names.saju_meaning: Wood element beautiful with Fire talent, vibrant yang energy of expressive excellence
